title: Two Cyber Architectures Diverge - TCR 04/16/26
description:
OpenAI released GPT-5.4-Cyber to thousands of verified defenders while Anthropic kept Mythos restricted to eleven organizations, Snap laid off 1,000 workers as its CEO disclosed that 65% of new code is AI-generated, and Greater Bay Technology rolled the first all-solid-state battery cells off a production line targeting vehicle deployment by year's end.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-16-2026/

Frontier AI cybersecurity split into two rival distribution architectures yesterday. OpenAI expanded its Trusted Access programme to thousands of verified security professionals with GPT-5.4-Cyber's full capabilities including binary reverse-engineering, while a Bloomberg feature revealed how Anthropic's red-team researcher Nicholas Carlini discovered Mythos could autonomously compromise the systems underlying most modern computing - leading Anthropic to restrict access to eleven organizations under Project Glasswing. Co-founder Jack Clark stated equivalent open-weight models will emerge from Chinese labs within twelve to eighteen months, confirming the restriction buys time rather than permanence. Anthropic simultaneously announced an 800-person London office in the Knowledge Quarter, days after OpenAI opened its own UK headquarters in the same district, making the AI sovereignty arc physical. Snap laid off approximately 1,000 employees with CEO Evan Spiegel disclosing that over 65% of new code is AI-generated, the stock rising 6% as markets rewarded the substitution. A Wired investigation documented deepfake sexual abuse incidents across roughly 90 schools in 28 countries affecting more than 600 identified students. Greater Bay Technology rolled its first all-solid-state battery cells off a production line targeting mass production by year's end, Suniva announced a 4.5 GW solar cell factory in South Carolina, and Colorado passed legislation requiring utilities to assess grid-enhancing technologies as utility investment plans surged 21% to $1.4 trillion.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-16-2026/
